Package neqsim.physicalproperties.methods.gasphysicalproperties.diffusivity

Class FullerSchettlerGiddingsDiffusivity

java.lang.Object
neqsim.physicalproperties.methods.PhysicalPropertyMethod
neqsim.physicalproperties.methods.gasphysicalproperties.GasPhysicalPropertyMethod
neqsim.physicalproperties.methods.gasphysicalproperties.diffusivity.Diffusivity
neqsim.physicalproperties.methods.gasphysicalproperties.diffusivity.FullerSchettlerGiddingsDiffusivity
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, DiffusivityInterface, PhysicalPropertyMethodInterface, ThermodynamicConstantsInterface
public class FullerSchettlerGiddingsDiffusivity extends Diffusivity
Fuller-Schettler-Giddings method for gas-phase binary diffusion coefficients.

This is considered the most accurate and widely recommended general correlation for gas-phase diffusion coefficients. It uses atomic diffusion volumes instead of Lennard-Jones parameters, making it applicable to a wider range of compounds including polar molecules and complex hydrocarbons where L-J parameters may be unavailable or unreliable.

The correlation is: 

 D_AB = 1.013e-2 * T ^ 1.75 * sqrt(1 / M_A + 1 / M_B) / (P * (V_A ^ (1 / 3) + V_B ^ (1 / 3)) ^ 2)

where D_AB is in cm^2/s, T in K, P in atm, M in g/mol, and V is the diffusion volume in cm^3/mol.

References:

  • Fuller, E.N., Schettler, P.D. and Giddings, J.C. (1966). "A new method for prediction of binary gas-phase diffusion coefficients." Ind. Eng. Chem., 58(5), 18-27.
  • Fuller, E.N., Ensley, K. and Giddings, J.C. (1969). "Diffusion of halogenated hydrocarbons in helium." J. Phys. Chem., 73, 3679-3685.
  • Poling, B.E., Prausnitz, J.M. and O'Connell, J.P. (2001). "The Properties of Gases and Liquids." 5th ed., McGraw-Hill, Table 11-1.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

    Field
    Description
    private static final Map<String,Double>
    ATOMIC_DIFFUSION_VOLUMES
    Atomic and structural diffusion volume increments (cm^3/mol) from Fuller, Schettler and Giddings (1966, 1969) and updated by Poling, Prausnitz and O'Connell (2001), Table 11-1.

      • Constant Field Values

    • ATOMIC_DIFFUSION_VOLUMES

      private static final Map<String,Double> ATOMIC_DIFFUSION_VOLUMES
      Atomic and structural diffusion volume increments (cm^3/mol) from Fuller, Schettler and Giddings (1966, 1969) and updated by Poling, Prausnitz and O'Connell (2001), Table 11-1.

    • MOLECULAR_DIFFUSION_VOLUMES

      private static final Map<String,Double> MOLECULAR_DIFFUSION_VOLUMES
      Special diffusion volumes for simple molecules (cm^3/mol). These are determined directly from experimental data and should be used in preference to summing atomic increments.

  • Constructor Details

    • FullerSchettlerGiddingsDiffusivity

      public FullerSchettlerGiddingsDiffusivity(PhysicalProperties gasPhase)
      Constructor for FullerSchettlerGiddingsDiffusivity.
      Parameters:
      gasPhase - a PhysicalProperties object

  • Method Details

    • createAtomicVolumes

      private static Map<String,Double> createAtomicVolumes()
      Create the table of atomic diffusion volume increments.
      Returns:
      map of element symbol to diffusion volume increment

    • createMolecularVolumes

      private static Map<String,Double> createMolecularVolumes()
      Create the table of special molecular diffusion volumes. These are experimentally derived values for simple molecules that should be used instead of summing atomic increments.
      Returns:
      map of component name to molecular diffusion volume

    • getDiffusionVolume

      private double getDiffusionVolume(int componentIndex)
      Get the diffusion volume for a component.

      First checks for a special molecular value, then attempts estimation from molecular formula / critical properties.

      Parameters:
      componentIndex - index of the component
      Returns:
      diffusion volume in cm^3/mol

    • calcBinaryDiffusionCoefficient
